markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the Superhuman \<\> GrowthX partnership and plan the 4-week wrap-up.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Partnership Ending:** The engagement concludes on Feb 17, driven by Superhuman's budget reallocation and internal resource availability (content team, freelancers, AirOps).](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [**Final Focus:** Prioritize mid-funnel, branded content (product features, comparisons) to reinforce the "Superhuman Mail" rebrand and capture high-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [**Operational Continuity:** Maintain the 10-article/week cadence with the existing workflow; Jess will not be a bottleneck despite upcoming travel.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Knowledge Transfer:** GrowthX will provide a performance summary, all project docs, and a complete list of new URLs published since Oct 25 to support Superhuman's internal projects.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Conclusion

  - [Superhuman is ending the partnership on Feb 17 due to budget reallocation and internal resource availability.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Internal resources include a content team, freelance bench, and the AirOps tool, which Superhuman will now leverage to its full potential.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [The decision was not performance-related; Superhuman expressed appreciation for GrowthX's work and transparency.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)

### Final 4-Week Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Reinforce the "Superhuman Mail" rebrand and capture high-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [**Priority:** Mid-funnel content on product features and comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [**Cadence:** Maintain the 10-article/week production rate.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [**Workflow:** Continue the current process to avoid bottlenecks, as Jess has limited availability due to upcoming on-site weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Interlinking:** All new content will link to the `superhuman.com/mail` product page to reinforce the brand and drive conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)

### Knowledge Transfer & Assets

  - [**Performance Summary:** GrowthX will deliver a report on key content patterns and successes from Feb 2025–Feb 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [**Project Docs:** All project assets will be transferred, including the December strategy update and OLAM experiment plans.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [**New URL List:** A complete list of new URLs published since Oct 25 will be provided to support Superhuman's internal infrastructure projects.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
      - [Maintain 10-article/week production cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
      - [Prioritize mid-funnel, branded content.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [Deliver performance summary (Feb 2025–Feb 2026).](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
      - [Transfer all project documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
      - [Provide final new URL list (published since Oct 25) before Feb 17.](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Superhuman:**](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [Alex to follow up with Emma on comparison article reviews (due EOW).](https://fathom.video/share/awEDqu9TVz8o-38v9t6K1zRRuxRDJusf?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
